calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiffs JANE FENG and ZHEN ZHOU, Tel No. (415) 876-6703 present in pro per (HELEN SU also present assisting Jane Feng as a Mandarin-language interpreter);
Atty. JERRY R. HAUSER of Miller Hauser Law Group LLP, Tel No. (415) 956-5400 appearing for Defendant David Yang.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: DEFENDANT DAVID YANG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. The document filed by Plaintiffs titled First Amended Complaint is stricken pursuant to the motion to strike. The document purporting to be a first amended complaint is a defense to the demurrer. DEFENSE COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Continued To May-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
